title: goodenia collaris
intro: Goodenia collaris, also known as the white-flowered goodenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia collaris include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Goodenia collaris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
